title: Is the project accelerating or stalling?
description: Monthly commit rhythm shows team momentum and release patterns. Anomalies are auto-detected using standard deviation.

basis.title: Analysis basis
basis.description: Review the repository scope and time window used for the activity signal.

chart.title: Monthly commit trend
chart.description: A steady rhythm is a healthy project signal. Orange bars indicate spikes, yellow bars indicate drops.

table.title: Monthly commits
table.description: Monthly activity extracted from Git history.
